raw_transcript: We need to act quickly. I'm referring you to the emergency department for a CT scan with IV contrast to check the blood flow to your bowel wall. Most of the time, it's transient and heals with IV fluids and bowel rest, but we have to ensure there's no full-thickness necrosis.
final_corrected_note: We need to act quickly. I'm referring you to the emergency department for a CT scan with IV contrast to check the blood flow to your bowel wall. Most of the time, it's transient and heals with IV fluids and bowel rest, but we have to ensure there's no full-thickness necrosis.
